data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption of customer and application data is a standard practice within Amazon's infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption standards are applied to data at rest and in transit.

data.title: Firewall Protection
data.description: Advanced firewall systems protect against unauthorized access and cyber threats.
data.technical_spec: Adaptive rules, threat intelligence integration, and monitoring protocols.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Amazon integrates sophisticated DDoS mitigation strategies to protect its services.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield Advanced, Route 53, and CloudFront services in use.

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Amazon employs IAM for securing access to AWS resources.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication, role-based access control policies.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine security audits ensure compliance and vulnerability management.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning, manual penetration testing, and management reviews.
